---
name: New Package Request
about: Request a new package to be added to Zoidberg
title: "[NEW PKG] "
labels: "Action/Add"
---

### Package Identification

- **Target Repository/Sub-repo:** <!-- e.g. @community/editors or @extra -->
- **Package Name:** <!-- e.g. my-cool-tool -->
- **Full Source String:** <!-- e.g. @community/editors/my-cool-tool -->

### Package Metadata

- **Source Git Repository:** <!-- e.g. https://github.com/user/my-cool-tool -->
- **Website/Homepage:** <!-- e.g. https://my-cool-tool.com -->
- **Description:** <!-- A short, one-line description of the package -->
- **License:** <!-- e.g. MIT, Apache-2.0 -->

### Platform Support

<!-- Please check the platforms this package supports -->
- [ ] `OS/Linux`
- [ ] `OS/macOS`
- [ ] `OS/Windows`
- [ ] `Arch/amd64`
- [ ] `Arch/arm64`

### Additional Context

<!-- Why should this package be added? Any specific build requirements? -->
